description: Provides context for what a Society produces. Use with Production Meaning table for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Provides context for what a Society produces. Use with Production Meaning table for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

entries.result: Sustenance: They produce something necessary to live, such as food. They may keep it to themselves or trade it with others

resultTranslations.en: Sustenance: They produce something necessary to live, such as food. They may keep it to themselves or trade it with others

entries.result: Luxury: They produce something many want, but no one needs. Perhaps they are renowned as a vacation destination or create luxury goods

resultTranslations.en: Luxury: They produce something many want, but no one needs. Perhaps they are renowned as a vacation destination or create luxury goods

entries.result: Knowledge: They trade in information, such as scientific research or education

resultTranslations.en: Knowledge: They trade in information, such as scientific research or education

entries.result: Protection: They offer protection, for their own people or others. Productivity is focused on making weapons and maintaining armies

resultTranslations.en: Protection: They offer protection, for their own people or others. Productivity is focused on making weapons and maintaining armies

entries.result: Trade: They don't make anything, but they are good at facilitating trade between others

resultTranslations.en: Trade: They don't make anything, but they are good at facilitating trade between others

entries.result: Self-Sufficient: They produce exactly what they need to survive, and no more. For instance, a society of hunters that provides for their own

resultTranslations.en: Self-Sufficient: They produce exactly what they need to survive, and no more. For instance, a society of hunters that provides for their own

entries.result: Industrial: They make fabricated goods that others need. For instance, an orbital station that makes starships

resultTranslations.en: Industrial: They make fabricated goods that others need. For instance, an orbital station that makes starships

entries.result: Multiple: Roll on this table twice for a dual Productivity Focus. Reroll Multiple if you get it again

resultTranslations.en: Multiple: Roll on this table twice for a dual Productivity Focus. Reroll Multiple if you get it again

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled
